FTL.text:
Project Wormhole uses the original game assets, which requires a copy of the original game. If you have installed FTL via the Steam or Epic Games storefronts, it should be auto-detected.
Otherwise, run FTL and it will also be auto-detected.
If neither of the above work, you'll have to set the path to ftl.dat manually. To do this, put the full OS path to FTL's data/ftl.dat file in: \1
